Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. 4D Doom 59 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 65 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Ministack (Replacement for LocalStack) 45 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. OkCupid gave 3M dating-app photos to facial recognition firm, FTC says 244 upvotes, 56 comments
  5. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Show HN: Forkrun – NUMA-aware shell parallelizer (50×–400× faster than parallel) 89 upvotes, 18 comments
  7. GitHub's Historic Uptime 339 upvotes, 97 comments
  8. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 57 upvotes, 11 comments
  9. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 264 upvotes, 85 comments
  10. A Primer on Long-Duration Life Support 51 upvotes, 12 comments
  11. Combinators 122 upvotes, 37 comments
  12. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1742 upvotes, 706 comments
  13. Accidentally created my first fork bomb with Claude Code 47 upvotes, 11 comments
  14. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 515 upvotes, 195 comments
  15. Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only 406 upvotes, 153 comments
  16. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 140 upvotes, 46 comments
  17. Nematophagous Fungus 26 upvotes, 5 comments
  18. GitHub Monaspace Case Study 100 upvotes, 35 comments
  19. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 1820 upvotes, 888 comments
  20. Ordinary Lab Gloves May Have Skewed Microplastic Data 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  21. Show HN: Postgres extension for BM25 relevance-ranked full-text search 72 upvotes, 28 comments
  22. Back to FreeBSD – Part 2 – Jails 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  23. I Traced My Traffic Through a Home Tailscale Exit Node 36 upvotes, 14 comments
  24. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 186 upvotes, 118 comments
  25. Super Micro Computer Investors Look for Exits 14 upvotes, 4 comments
  26. Scotty: A beautiful SSH task runner 37 upvotes, 22 comments
  27. OpenAI closes funding round at an $852B valuation 207 upvotes, 182 comments
  28. Ask HN: Distributed data centers in our basements 41 upvotes, 53 comments
  29. Slop is not necessarily the future 136 upvotes, 249 comments
  30. Why the US Navy won't blast the Iranians and 'open' Strait of Hormuz 105 upvotes, 256 comments

Last generated 6:30am, 1 April 2026. Source here.
